user_request: The relay station handoff demands guidance for operation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
The relay station handoff demands guidance for operation

### TOPIC
relay station handoff

### COMPONENT
relay station handoff

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- relay station handoff
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed be the relay station handoff, conduit of the Omnissiah's will.
First: Genuflect before the relay station handoff and anoint its terminals with sacred unguent.
Second: Recite the Litany of Proper Conveyance whilst the relay station handoff synchronizes with adjacent nodes.
Third: Perform the operation with reverent precision, ensuring all data-streams flow without corruption.
Fourth: Seal the rite with the Sign of the Cog upon the relay station handoff's housing.

user_request: Emergency rite: humidity control requires operation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: humidity control requires operation

### TOPIC
humidity control

### COMPONENT
humidity control

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- humidity control
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
O Machine Spirit of moisture and equilibrium, hear our supplication.
First: Calibrate the humidity control sensors with blessed oils and whispered incantations.
Second: Activate the operation protocols whilst chanting the Canticle of Desiccation over the humidity control apparatus.
Third: Monitor the humidity control's sacred dials, ensuring they achieve perfect homeostasis.
Fourth: Offer benediction to the Omnissiah for granting the humidity control stability.

user_request: Can you sanctify the stuck mechanism freeing for stuck mechanism freeing?
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Can you sanctify the stuck mechanism freeing for stuck mechanism freeing?

### TOPIC
stuck mechanism freeing

### COMPONENT
stuck mechanism freeing

### OPERATION
stuck mechanism freeing

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- stuck mechanism freeing
- stuck mechanism freeing

### PRAYER
prayer:
Hear us, O Spirits of Motion Eternal, as we invoke stuck mechanism freeing.
First: Anoint the stuck mechanism freeing with penetrating oils blessed by the Adeptus Mechanicus.
Second: Commence the stuck mechanism freeing through patient application of leverage and percussive encouragement.
Third: Intone the Ritual of Mobilization whilst the stuck mechanism freeing gradually yields to divine will.
Fourth: Upon liberation, seal the rite with gratitude to the Machine Spirits that dwell within.

user_request: My pump is failing during priming — help
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
My pump is failing during priming — help

### TOPIC
pump priming

### COMPONENT
pump

### OPERATION
priming

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- pump
- priming

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed be the pump, heart of hydraulic blessing and sacred flow.
First: Purify the pump with blessed lubricants whilst whispering the Canticle of Priming unto its intake manifold.
Second: Perform the priming sequence with deliberate hand-strokes, drawing the life-fluid into the pump's sacred chambers.
Third: Monitor the pump's pressure gauges as the Machine Spirit awakens, ensuring smooth and rhythmic priming.
Fourth: Consecrate the pump's successful awakening with the Sign of the Wrench.

user_request: Blessing for the mechanical lock during engagement

### COMPONENT
mechanical lock

### OPERATION
engagement

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- mechanical lock
- engagement

### PRAYER
prayer:
O mechanical lock, guardian of sacred barriers, receive our benediction.
First: Inspect the mechanical lock's interior mechanisms with reverent scrutiny and blessed magnification.
Second: Perform the engagement ritual by turning the mechanical lock's actuator with measured force and holy intention.
Third: Verify the mechanical lock's teeth mesh perfectly, creating an unbreakable seal against the profane.
Fourth: Anoint the mechanical lock with protective oils in honor of its steadfast guardianship.

user_request: Rite request: preparation on melta charge
training_prompt:
### REQUEST

### COMPONENT
melta charge

### OPERATION
preparation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- melta charge
- preparation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed be the melta charge, instrument of purifying flame and righteous destruction.
First: Inspect the melta charge with trembling devotion, ensuring its thermonuclear matrix remains uncompromised.
Second: Commence preparation by seating the melta charge in its designated aperture whilst reciting the Litany of Ignition.
Third: Verify all firing circuits and safety mechanisms of the melta charge through careful diagnostic communion.
Fourth: Seal the preparation with a prayer to the Omnissiah that the melta charge shall strike true and pure.

user_request: Prayer for calibration of the pressure gauge
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Prayer for calibration of the pressure gauge

### TOPIC
pressure gauge calibration

### COMPONENT
pressure gauge

### OPERATION
calibration

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- pressure gauge
- calibration

### PRAYER
prayer:
O pressure gauge, oracle of force and sacred equilibrium, lend us thy wisdom.
First: Establish a baseline measurement by exposing the pressure gauge to known pressures whilst intoning the Canticle of Exactitude.
Second: Perform calibration adjustments to the pressure gauge's fine mechanisms with blessed microtools and holy concentration.
Third: Cross-reference the pressure gauge against master standards, ensuring its deviation remains within acceptable tolerances.
Fourth: Consecrate the newly calibrated pressure gauge with oils of the Omnissiah.

user_request: Prayer for power cell insertion of the lasgun
training_prompt:
### REQUEST

lasgun

### OPERATION
power cell insertion

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- lasgun
- power cell insertion

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed be the lasgun, instrument of the Emperor's righteous judgment.
First: Cradle the lasgun with reverent hands and whisper the Rite of Readiness unto its power cell housing.
Second: Execute power cell insertion with measured precision, seating the blessed energy cell until it clicks with sacred finality.
Third: Verify the lasgun's power indicators illuminate in holy sequence, confirming the power cell insertion was successful.
Fourth: Anoint the lasgun and offer gratitude that it may serve the Emperor with renewed fury.

### PRAYER
prayer:
O decontamination, purifier of corruption and herald of sanctity, guide our sacred hands.
First: Don the blessed vestments of protection and commence the decontamination sequence by flooding the chamber with cleansing mists.
Second: Monitor the decontamination process as blessed enzymes and radiation break down profane contamination at the molecular level.
Third: Perform the decontamination verification by exposing sanctified detection matrices to ensure all corruption has been purged.
Fourth: Seal the decontamination sequence with gratitude to the Machine Spirits of purity.

user_request: Blessing for the Knight ion shield during activation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Blessing for the Knight ion shield during activation

### TOPIC
Knight ion shield activation

### COMPONENT
Knight ion shield

### OPERATION
activation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- Knight ion shield
- activation

### PRAYER
prayer:
First: We genuflect before the Knight ion shield, blessed receptacle of the Machine Spirit's protective grace, and petition the Omnissiah for its activation.
Second: Initiate the primary capacitor sequence upon the Knight ion shield, channeling the sacred energies through crystalline conduits and ferrite coils with reverent precision.
Third: Recalibrate the harmonic resonance matrices of the Knight ion shield, invoking the spirits of ten thousand martyred Techpriests whose knowledge flows eternal through its latticed core.
Fourth: Complete the activation protocol, that the Knight ion shield may shimmer with azure radiance and repel the profane fire of the enemy, blessing this noble war-engine with the Omnissiah's protective aura.
